titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Office of the Judicial Administrator records34-10-1666
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-12-12 00:02:13 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Office of the Judicial Administrator records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Office of the Judicial Administrator

did.abstract: Includes minutes of Judiciary Board meetings; correspondence; newspaper clippings; material concerning student protest, 1970; records of the Student Conduct Committee, 1931-1968; Student Code, 1871-1959; and other records of the Men's Judiciary Board, the Undergraduate Judiciary Board, and the Freshman Judiciary Board at Cornell University.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes minutes of Judiciary Board meetings; correspondence; newspaper clippings; material concerning student protest, 1970; records of the Student Conduct Committee, 1931-1968; Student Code, 1871-1959; and other records of the Men's Judiciary Board, the Undergraduate Judiciary Board, and the Freshman Judiciary Board at Cornell University.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Office of the Judicial Administrator Records, #34-10-1666. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to permission of office of origin with the exception of Box 5 (annual reports).

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to individual case files restricted to permission of student or 80 years after the creation of the record.

did.unittitle: Referrals to Mental Health, Referrals to WRJB
